_patch_meta.description: REPAIR: Restore H3820A lev (mti=581) from status=delete to status=extracted. Term was incorrectly caught in bulk cleanup — status_note on mti=581 explicitly identifies it as the canonical anchor term for Registry 183 (heart). Registry 183 verse_context_status reset to In Progress: VCB was completed without H3820A, which means the heart registry's verse context classification is incomplete. A targeted VCB session for H3820A lev is required before Registry 183 can return to Complete.

set.status_note: THE primary Hebrew heart term — H3820A lev. Must be extracted as the registry anchor term for Registry 183. RESTORED 2026-04-08: incorrectly set to delete during bulk cleanup. Vertical pass investigation surfaced the error via Jer 7:24 analysis.

operations.description: Restore H3820A lev mti=581 to status=extracted — canonical heart anchor term
Reset Registry 183 (heart) verse_context_status to In Progress — VCB was completed without H3820A lev. Targeted VCB session required for lev before registry can return to Complete.

_patch_summary.rationale: mti=581 H3820A lev status_note explicitly states this is the canonical anchor term for Registry 183. Status=delete was set in error during bulk cleanup. Five other H3820A entries (mti=1436, 2265, 4183, 4922, 6603) are legitimate deletes — phantom/bleed entries — and are not touched by this patch. Only mti=581 (owning_registry_fk=183, delete_flagged=0) is restored.
